title: Minecraft
note: The best-selling video game of all time. Players build and explore endless procedurally generated worlds; longevity across every platform keeps the number climbing.
caveat: Counts all editions across all platforms combined.

title: Grand Theft Auto V
note: Rockstar's open-world juggernaut, sustained for a decade by GTA Online and re-releases across three console generations.

title: Tetris (EA Mobile)
note: The mobile-era resurgence of the block-stacking classic, bundled across feature phones during the casual-gaming boom.
caveat: This is the EA mobile edition only, not every Tetris version ever made combined.

title: Wii Sports
note: The motion-control showcase that put a Wii in living rooms worldwide and made gamers of non-gamers.
caveat: Largely a pack-in title bundled with the console in most regions.

title: PUBG: Battlegrounds
note: PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds defined the modern battle-royale and ignited a genre that reshaped online play.
caveat: Boxed PC / console sales; excludes the separate free-to-play mobile version.

title: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe
note: The definitive kart racer, riding the Switch's enormous install base plus a steady stream of track DLC.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
note: A sprawling, detail-obsessed open-world Western widely praised for its storytelling and simulation depth.

title: Super Mario Bros.
note: The blockbuster that rescued home consoles in the West and wrote the rulebook for the platformer.

title: Terraria
note: A 2D sandbox-survival adventure with surprising depth that has sold steadily for over a decade.

title: Pokémon Red / Green / Blue
note: The first-generation games that launched one of the most valuable media franchises ever created.
caveat: Combined sales of the original Gen-1 releases (incl. Yellow).

title: Animal Crossing: New Horizons
note: The pandemic-era comfort hit, a gentle island life-sim that became a cultural moment in 2020.

title: Wii Fit + Wii Fit Plus
note: The Balance-Board fitness phenomenon that turned the living room into a gym.
caveat: Combined sales of Wii Fit and the Wii Fit Plus revision.

title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
note: The open-world RPG that keeps being re-released and keeps selling across every generation of hardware.
caveat: Estimate spanning all editions and re-releases.

title: Call of Duty: Black Ops III
note: One of the best-selling entries in the annual shooter behemoth, spanning current and previous-gen consoles.

title: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate
note: The crossover fighting celebration packing in nearly every character from gaming history.
